messages.content:
I found that there are many records in `hard` with duplicate `eq1_id` and `eq2_id`, as shown in the screenshot below (54, 2,695). Is this normal? Could someone help clarify? Thank you.
[screenshot-20260325-222531.png](/user_uploads/5/d0/xB0e1eqI4sHDXLSTEENprXTa/screenshot-20260325-222531.png)
Please use hard1 which is the dedupe version of hard.
2 messages were moved here from #**general>dataset** by @_**Terence Tao|28**.
